rich_text.plain_text: Danvers, MA – February 18, 2025 - MAXAM Tire, a global leader in specialty tire manufacturing, is excited to announce the launch of its latest product, the

text.content: MS330

rich_text.plain_text: MS330

text.content: . Engineered to excel across demanding applications, the MS330 features a range of enhancements designed to boost traction, improve heat resistance and extend overall tire life. From its robust casing design to its advanced tread compounds, the MS330 delivers superior performance where it matters.

rich_text.plain_text: . Engineered to excel across demanding applications, the MS330 features a range of enhancements designed to boost traction, improve heat resistance and extend overall tire life. From its robust casing design to its advanced tread compounds, the MS330 delivers superior performance where it matters.

text.content: Built for Tough Conditions, Designed to Deliver

rich_text.plain_text: Built for Tough Conditions, Designed to Deliver

text.content: Improved E3/L3 Traction Pattern:

rich_text.plain_text: Improved E3/L3 Traction Pattern:

text.content: A redesigned, more aggressive traction pattern increases grip on challenging surfaces, helping operators maintain control in diverse conditions.

rich_text.plain_text: A redesigned, more aggressive traction pattern increases grip on challenging surfaces, helping operators maintain control in diverse conditions.

text.content: Increased Tread Depth:

rich_text.plain_text: Increased Tread Depth:

text.content: Deeper tread maximizes traction and extends tire life, ensuring end-users get the most out of every tire.

rich_text.plain_text: Deeper tread maximizes traction and extends tire life, ensuring end-users get the most out of every tire.

text.content: Cooler Running:

rich_text.plain_text: Cooler Running:

text.content: Enhanced construction and undertread compounds work in tandem to reduce heat buildup – promoting more consistent performance during prolonged use.

rich_text.plain_text: Enhanced construction and undertread compounds work in tandem to reduce heat buildup – promoting more consistent performance during prolonged use.

text.content: Robust Casing:

rich_text.plain_text: Robust Casing:

text.content: Fortified casing design resists damage and maintains integrity under heavy loads, translating to fewer replacements and a lower total cost of ownership.

text.content: Full Size OD and tread Width:

text.content: Larger overall diameter and tread width deliver optimal ground contact, improving stability while reducing wear and tear.
